opportunities.entry_trigger: Scale into longs $65,600-$68,300 on intraday dips toward the demand zone; require a daily close above $65,000 to hold. Add on any 4H close back above $70,000.
opportunities.rationale: Crypto Fear & Greed at 10 (Extreme Fear) is a historically reliable contrarian signal for BTC — readings below 15 have preceded 20-40% rallies within 30 days in prior cycles. BTC down 8.8% in 7 days to $68,301, testing the $65K-$68K demand zone that held during the Jan-Feb correction. Geopolitical risk (Iran/Hormuz) is the overhang but priced into broader market. PCE inflation data Mar 28 is the next directional catalyst — a soft print could trigger risk-on rotation into BTC. Fed dot plot showing only 1 cut in 2026 limits upside pace but spot ETF structural bid remains intact. Invalidated below $61,500 which would confirm a breakdown toward $55K.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter $1,960-$2,060 only if BTC holds above $65,000; invalidated on any 4H close below $1,900. Prefer limit orders at $1,980-$2,000 round-number support.
opportunities.rationale: BlackRock staked Ethereum ETF (launched Mar 14 on Nasdaq) provides a structural institutional accumulation catalyst that differentiates ETH from other alts. ETH down 12.1% in 7 days to $2,067, approaching the $1,950-$2,000 structural support from the Dec 2025 consolidation floor. LOW conviction enforced: ETH is underperforming BTC on the ETH/BTC ratio in this risk-off leg, and altcoins are capped in the high-vol regime per strategy rules. PCE Mar 28 soft read would benefit ETH disproportionately as a risk-on beta play. Invalidated below $1,780 crash level which would signal capitulation.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter $83-$87 only if BTC holds above $65,000 and SOL prints a daily RSI bullish divergence on the 4H chart; exit immediately on a BTC breakdown below $65K.
opportunities.rationale: CME SOL futures and options (launched Jan 2026) provide growing institutional access and legitimacy, building the structural case for a SOL spot ETF filing cycle. SOL down 9.7% in 7 days to $86.93, testing $83-$88 support from the Feb consolidation range. Highest beta of the three positions — sized at 1% risk only. LOW conviction enforced: altcoins are inherently dangerous in Extreme Fear with high-vol regime. NFP Apr 4 and potential SOL ETF newsflow are forward catalysts. Invalidated below $74 (Jan 2026 swing low) which would signal trend breakdown.
